title: Reproduce complete Durable Ledger State
preconditions: Representative Ledger containing every durable state type plus derived reconciliation baseline.
steps: Create and independently verify backup; prepare restore into an empty generation; compare manifests, counts, exact totals, history, relationship rules, and idempotency outcomes; activate; repeat with corrupted and incompatible candidates.
expected: Accepted drill reproduces all Durable Ledger State and baseline totals; rejected drills never change CURRENT; previous generation remains the recovery point.
